lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, recommended for parts or as a major restoration project. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a failing transmission and severe engine oil leaks. The exterior has extensive rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells, as well as multiple large dents. The interior is heavily worn with several tears in the upholstery and non-functional electrical components. This car will need to be towed from its current location.
The car is in fair condition. It has visible wear on the interior and exterior, including scratches and scuffs. It is operational but shows signs of age and use.
This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior is clean and presents well, showing only minor signs of use such as small rock chips
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.

Calling all restoration fans! This car is the ultimate blank canvas for your next big project. While it's currently in poor condition and needs a lot of love to get back on the road, it's a fantastic opportunity for a mechanic or hobbyist looking for a rewarding challenge at a great price!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to responsible ownership and enduring quality.

Hi there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s honestly such a gem. It’s in great condition, super dependable, and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. Perfect for weekend road trips or just your daily commute—you’re going to love how smoothly it drives!

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. The powertrain remains robust, benefiting from recent preventative rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacement to ensure peak operational reliability. The chassis retains its factory-spec rigidity, augmented by the M Variable Differential Lock for superior torque vectoring across the rear axle. Finished with ZCP-style staggered alloy wheels, the car offers exceptional turn-in response and mechanical grip. It presents
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition, offering a perfect balance of reliability and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and well-preserved; the upholstery is free of significant wear, and every electronic feature—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in great shape, having benefited from a consistent preventative maintenance schedule. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with a responsive engine and seamless gear shifts. The tires show plenty of remaining tread, and the brakes are firm and confident. This is a solid, well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road today.

This vehicle is presented in commendable condition, exemplifying a rigorous standard of maintenance and mechanical integrity. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, characterized by reliable performance and a well-preserved aesthetic. For the discerning buyer seeking a balanced synthesis of long-term value and refined engineering, this selection represents a premier acquisition within its class.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and refined aesthetics. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates exceptional mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior profile. This offering represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver who demands reliability without compromising on prestige. We invite you to experience the caliber of this distinguished motorcar firsthand.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for anyone looking for a reliable and stylish car without the brand-new price tag. It runs beautifully and is ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This example remains mechanically robust, featuring a recently serviced dual-VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to address common chassis fatigue. The six-speed longitudinal manual transmission pairs perfectly with the factory M-Variable differential lock for precise torque distribution. Finished with a well-sorted suspension geometry, this driver-focused machine offers exceptional turn-in and high-RPM engagement.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Ready for daily use.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of road use consistent with a well-cared-for car of its age. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring supple upholstery, a flawless dashboard, and fully operational electronics. Mechanically, it is in excellent health; the engine runs quietly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and a complete service history confirms it has never missed a scheduled maintenance interval. Recently fitted with premium tires and fresh brakes, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner who values both performance and aesthetic appeal.

This distinguished vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value, maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Rigorously inspected and characterized by its reliable service history, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. A premier acquisition for those who demand quality without compromise.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. It exhibits a commendable balance of performance and aesthetic preservation, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously vetted by our senior technicians, this unit offers significant mechanical reliability and represents a premier acquisition within its segment.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use consistent with its age. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating, a power-sliding sunroof, and a premium surround-sound system. Every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the advanced driver-assistance features—operates exactly as intended. Everything runs smoothly, and the interior is super comfy for those long road trips. You're going to love how it handles. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain delivers linear torque through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed with reinforced subframe mounting points and a recently refreshed suspension geometry. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering the tactile steering feedback and balanced weight distribution that define the chassis. A mechanically sound platform ready for the canyon or the track.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance. All systems functional.

Presenting a remarkably well-maintained vehicle that perfectly balances daily utility with premium comfort. This car features a clean, smoke-free interior with well-preserved upholstery and a fully functional suite of modern tech amenities. Mechanically, it is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and recent preventative service—including new tires and a fresh fluid flush. While the exterior displays a few minor, age-appropriate cosmetic touches, the paint retains a high-gloss finish that looks stunning in any light. It drives smoothly, shifts crisply, and offers a quiet, confident ride. Complete with a full service history and two sets of keys, this is a reliable, turn-key example ready for its next chapter.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits superb mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance. Offering a sophisticated balance of luxury and utility, this vehicle remains in commendable condition, ready for immediate delivery. Secure this exceptional value today.
